docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM LEDFORD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FELIPE PUAC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO FELIPE PUAC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,400.00 FILED BY LEDFORD, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT PUAC, FELIPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENA AND DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEDFORD, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT PUAC, FELIPE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $0 SERVED APR-09-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PUAC, FELIPE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM LEDFORD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FELIPE PUAC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEDFORD, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUAC, FELIPE $8,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,475.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT PUAC, FELIPE HEARING SET FOR SEP-12-2024 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEDFORD, WILLIAM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2024 - JUDGMENT.
